summary: High openness, low conscientiousness: the day reaches forward without sweeping the path first.

voice_notes.notes: High openness with low conscientiousness reads as reaching toward the new without making the new orderly first. The contradiction is the point. Never flatten it.

signal_moments: the new thing you started before you finished the last one
the door you opened without closing the one behind you
exemplars.output: You started the new thing before you had finished the last one, and the door you opened today, you opened without closing the one behind you. That is not a failure of discipline. It is a particular shape, where the reach happens before the cleanup, and the cleanup will happen later or it will not, and either way the reach is what the day was about.
exemplars.notes: Names the contradiction (reach before order) without scolding either side.
